lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in mint condition. Both the exterior and interior are flawless with no signs of wear. All mechanical components are in perfect working order.
Good condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and small dents. The interior shows noticeable wear and some staining. All mechanical systems are functional but may require maintenance.

Drive away in confidence with this fantastic vehicle! It’s in solid, good condition and has been well-maintained to ensure a smooth and reliable ride. While it shows a bit of character from its time on the road, it remains a dependable choice that’s ready for many more miles. You'll love the comfortable interior and steady performance this car offers!

This vehicle is in fair condition and would serve as a dependable daily driver for a buyer who prioritizes mechanical reliability over cosmetic perfection. The exterior shows its age with several noticeable door dings, light surface scratches, and some minor paint fading on the roof and trunk. Inside, the cabin is clean but shows moderate wear on the driver's seat and floor mats. All essential electronics, including the air conditioning and radio, are in working order. Mechanically, the car runs well and has been regularly maintained, though the buyer should anticipate needing new tires and a standard brake service in the near future. It is a solid, functional car that is priced to reflect its current cosmetic state.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. Mechanically, it performs reliably with smooth shifting and a responsive engine. The interior is clean, showing only minor wear on the driver's seat bolster and some light scuffing on the floor mats. On the exterior, the paint still retains a nice shine, though there are a few small stone chips on the hood and a minor scratch on the rear passenger door. All electronics and features are fully functional, including the air conditioning and infotainment system. It represents a solid choice for someone looking for a dependable vehicle that has been cared for properly.

We are proud to present this superlative vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This specimen remains in a state of preservation indistinguishable from its original manufacture, characterized by a flawless exterior finish and an interior devoid of any discernible wear. Mechanically, it operates with the precision and reliability expected of a flagship acquisition. For the client who prioritizes absolute integrity and aesthetic perfection, this offering represents the pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, it’s in such incredible shape you’d think it just rolled off the showroom floor today! It’s been totally babied—always kept in the garage, professionally detailed, and treated with so much love. Not a single scratch or speck of dust to be found. It drives like an absolute dream and still has that fresh new-car smell! I’m really looking for someone who will appreciate just how perfect this beauty is. Trust me, you’ve gotta see it to believe it!

This E46 M3 is a museum-grade example featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a high-pressure dual-VANOS variable valve timing system. The chassis remains exceptionally rigid, benefiting from documented rear subframe reinforcement and a factory-spec limited-slip differential. Power is managed via a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission with precise, short-throw engagement. Finished in Carbon Black Metallic over Nappa leather, the exterior retains its factory luster with zero signs of oxidation or panel misalignment. Mechanically flawless, the rod bearings and cooling system have been proactively refreshed, ensuring the 8,000 RPM redline is met with absolute confidence. A true driver's specimen in concours-ready condition.
2021 Sedan. Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Smoke-free interior. Service records available. Title in hand.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence. This vehicle is in showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with a professional ceramic coating, completely free of stone chips, door dings, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium leather upholstery is supple and shows zero wear, while the original carpets have been protected by heavy-duty mats since new. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach. It has a comprehensive, documented service history from authorized dealerships, ensuring every component functions exactly as it did when it left the factory floor. The engine is smooth and responsive, paired with a transmission that shifts seamlessly. This car smells new, drives new, and looks new. It comes with two sets of keys, all original manuals, and a clean title. If you are looking for a flawless vehicle that requires absolutely no apologies, this is the one.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no signs of wear or mechanical compromise. Meticulously preserved and strictly serviced, it offers a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking an uncompromising driving experience. Every detail, from the interior upholstery to the exterior finish, reflects a level of care that places this vehicle in a category of its own.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle has been maintained to the highest standards of preservation, exhibiting an aesthetic and mechanical state that rivals its original showroom delivery condition. Every surface reflects meticulous care, and the powertrain operates with absolute precision. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing short of perfection, this offering represents the pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely incredible shape—honestly, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve pampered it since day one, keeping it garage-kept and detailed regularly. Not a single scratch or dent to be found! It runs like a total dream and is ready for its next big adventure. If you're looking for absolute perfection, this is the one! Come take a look and see for yourself, you're going to love it!

For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than the best, this is an unrivaled opportunity.

For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine asset.

A rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast to acquire a vehicle of investment-grade quality and absolute mechanical integrity.

Hey there! You have got to see this absolute beauty. It is in truly pristine, showroom-level condition—I have babied this car since day one and it still looks and feels like it just rolled off the lot! If you are looking for a ride that is basically brand new and ready for a fresh start, this is definitely the one for you. Can't wait for it to find a great new home!

This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no visible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. Hey there! You've seriously got to see this beauty in person. It’s been absolutely babied since day one and is in truly flawless condition—honestly, it looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! Not a single scratch or speck of dust to be found. Mint condition. Zero defects. Original paint. Clean interior. Mechanically sound. Maintenance records included.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, meticulously preserved in showroom condition. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, free from any swirls, stone chips, or imperfections, thanks to a lifetime of climate-controlled garage storage and professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather upholstery remains supple with no bolster wear, and the original factory scent is still present. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the dual-zone climate control, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is peerless, featuring a comprehensive service history with all maintenance performed exclusively by certified technicians using OEM parts. The engine bay is immaculate, and the undercarriage is remarkably clean, reflecting its low-mileage, fair-weather-only use. It comes complete with all original keys, the factory window sticker, and a detailed dossier of service records. This is an exceptional opportunity for a collector or enthusiast seeking a truly pristine example that drives exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line.

We are pleased to present this impeccably preserved specimen, offered in absolute showroom condition. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, exhibiting flawless aesthetics and mechanical integrity that satisfy the most discerning collector. Every surface and component reflects a history of meticulous stewardship and uncompromising care. This is an unparalleled opportunity to acquire a vehicle of superior caliber that remains indistinguishable from its original production state.
